name: Delumon

signature_move.name: Royal Nuts
signature_move.description: Fires curious objects similar to eggs or nuts from the thicket on its back.

description: Even though it appears to be a Bird Digimon at first glance, it is a strange Digimon with verdant, lush vegetation growing from its back. Like Kiwimon , it possesses some of the characteristics of plants and is not able to fly. It is very prideful and believes itself to be nobility, but in truth, it finds the fact that it cannot fly agonising. That said, as expected of a Digimon that has evolved until the Perfect level, it is a capable Digimon with high combat ability. It boasts of the crown it wears on its head, and its beak that shines gold. Its Special Move is firing curious objects similar to eggs or nuts from the thicket on its back ( Royal Nuts ).
